name: Abdul Ala ibn Yazid
title: Companion of Kalb
shortDescription: A brave man from the Kalb tribe who answered the Imam's call and sacrificed his life in the desert of Karbala.
fullStory:
Abdul A'la ibn Yazid al-Kalbi was a brave Shia from the Bani Kalb tribe (the same tribe Lady Abbas's mother was from). He had a heartfelt devotion to the Prophet's (PBUH) family.

Upon hearing the news of the Imam's presence in Karbala, Abdul A'la left Kufa and reached the caravan of light. On Ashura, he was ready to sacrifice himself with sincere love.

He stood alongside the other companions of the Master of Martyrs (AS) against Ibn Sa'd's army. Abdul A'la fought bravely during the enemy's first attack and, after a fierce battle, attained the great grace of martyrdom.

The name of this brave martyr is mentioned in Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya, indicating his spiritual greatness in choosing the truth.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى عَبْدِ الأَعْلَى بْنِ يَزِيدَ الكَلْبِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Abdul A'la ibn Yazid al-Kalbi...
